title: Unembellished pistachio anarkali for a walima
concept_summary: A quiet, modern walima concept in a floor-length georgette anarkali kept entirely plain, letting the flowing silhouette and soft pistachio tone carry the look without any surface work.

garment_breakdown.overall_form: A high-waisted anarkali flaring to the floor over a churidar, with a soft dupatta.
garment_breakdown.silhouette: A fitted bodice releasing into a full, floor-sweeping flare.
garment_breakdown.drape_or_layering: The dupatta falls across one shoulder in a single soft layer.
garment_breakdown.key_proportions: A high empire line lengthens the flowing skirt of the anarkali.

colour_story.palette_summary: A calm pistachio softened by warm champagne.
colour_story.placement: Pistachio fills the anarkali with champagne warming the dupatta.
colour_story.rationale: Muted pastels suit an understated evening walima.

fabrics_and_texture.finish_and_movement: A light, fluid drape with a gentle, floating movement.

techniques: No surface embellishment; the fabric is left plain
embellishment_plan.density: No added embellishment; the surface stays plain and unworked.
motifs: No motifs; the fabric reads clean and minimal
embellishment_plan.restraint_notes: Deliberately unembellished for a clean, restrained silhouette.

coverage_and_drape.back_and_midriff: The anarkali fully covers the torso and back.
coverage_and_drape.head_covering: No head covering; the dupatta stays on the shoulder.
coverage_and_drape.dupatta_or_saree_drape: A single soft dupatta draped over one shoulder.

interpretation_notes: No broad regional direction was requested, so styling stays general.
safeguards: The plain treatment is honoured; no embellishment is invented.

styling_notes: Keep jewellery delicate to match the unembellished fabric.
construction_caveats: This is a concept visualisation only and is not a sewing pattern.
It does not guarantee that the garment can be constructed exactly as shown.
image_alt_text: A model in a plain pistachio floor-length anarkali with a soft dupatta over one shoulder for a walima.
